gate.title: Community Projects
gate.lead: Join others working toward a shared, real-world goal — clean water, community gardens, malaria source reduction. Your everyday habits add up to collective change, and you can see what teammates are doing.

strip.cardA11y: {{title}}. {{pct}}% of this week's goal. {{active}} active today.

detail.unavailable: This project is no longer available.
detail.shareBody: Let members see the habits you complete here. Your contributions count either way.
detail.tileAskSub: Get a habit that worked for them
detail.yourActivitiesEmpty: Add a suggested activity below — or your own — to make it yours.
detail.postUpdate: 💬 Post an update to your community
detail.postUpdateA11y: Post an update to this project
detail.noActivity: No activity yet. Be the first to contribute!
detail.leaveBody: Your habits stay — they just stop contributing here.
detail.adoptedBody: “{{title}}” is now a daily habit of yours — it shows on your Today and powers this project every time you do it.
detail.inviteMessage: Join me on Levellio for “{{title}}”. Use invite code {{code}} or open levellio://join/{{code}}

editor.title: New project
editor.lead: Rally people around a shared, real-world goal. Invite others once it’s created.
editor.summaryPlaceholder: What are you working toward and why?
editor.rewardLabel: Reward when the goal is met
editor.rewardPlaceholder: e.g. Seeds + tools for the garden
editor.pinUseA11y: Use my current location as the project site
editor.pinHint: Lets members’ on-the-ground completions show as “on-site”. Requires location permission.

card.addGoalA11y: Add this activity to a goal

join.title: Join a project
join.lead: Enter the invite code someone shared with you.
join.shareBody: Let members see the habits you complete for this project (name + time). Your contributions count toward the goal either way.
join.shareA11y: Share my activity in this project
join.notFound: No project found for that code. Double-check it with whoever invited you.
